productDisplayName: Skechers Men Berra Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and functional, these Striking-Berra sandals from skechers are perfect for urban wear. With a fisherman design, these sandals can be used for casual wear. Look super stylish in these comfortable pair all day long. Upper Leather uppers in a fisherman design covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style Stitch detailing for added style Cushioned collar and textile lining for greater comfort Strap with Velcro closures on the side for a snug Fit Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with aggressive lugs for greater grip Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
